$comment: c46 D-FFI-TIME-STRUCT-TIMESPEC: ship struct timespec from <time.h> (the sqlite frontier after c45 cleared FILENAME_MAX). sqlite os_unix `struct timespec sp;` (sqlite3.c:47379) failed S0028 (incomplete type) because time.json shipped struct tm but not timespec. Added struct timespec {tv_sec i64, tv_nsec i64} (16 bytes, flat -- byte-identical on glibc/Darwin LP64) to time.json's structs surface. Exit 42 iff sizeof==16 + both fields round-trip at distinct offsets. <time.h> is gated [elf,macho] (FULL-UNIX-build targets), so NO pe target (a pe build uses os_win). RED-ON-DISABLE: remove timespec from time.json -> S0028. The fold is at semantic time; optimized pipelines re-verify the same layout. Targets: x86_64-elf (WSL run) + arm64-elf (qemu run) + arm64-macho (compile-only, no darwin host).
